known_limitations: The qualifying event has ended and cannot be repeated through new activity.
Attribution depended on the verified email associated with the account when GitHub determined eligible contributions.
achievement.name: Mars 2020 Contributor
achievement.primary_action: Contributed to repositories used by the Mars 2020 mission
achievement.trigger: The account authored or co-authored a commit present in the listed qualifying tag of a repository used by the Mars 2020 Helicopter Mission.
